assessor_1_raw: Label weighting cap at 10x is symmetric across both models. Implementation detail, not a bias. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Patient-level leakage at split boundaries is correctly prevented by assigning boundary-spanning patients to the earlier partition. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Platt scaling calibration on validation set is correctly applied - it uses validation data only, not test data. Verdict: defense_wins.
